name: NONOTOWN: Nonogram Logic Puzzle
short_description: NONOTOWN is a puzzle game with four nonogram modes: classic, color, and two unique challenges—'Block' and 'Color Block,' where pre-filled parts must be rotated to solve. Put your logic to the test with hundreds of levels across all modes!
detailed_description:
NONOTOWN takes the classic puzzle-solving experience of nonograms to a whole new level with four distinct game modes. Whether you're a fan of traditional puzzles or looking for something more dynamic, NONOTOWN has something for everyone.

In the Classic and Color modes, you'll use logic and precision to fill in grids based on the numerical clues provided. But the real twist comes with our innovative Blocks and Color Blocks modes. Here, you'll encounter pre-filled segments that need to be rotated to fit into place, creating a fresh and challenging layer of gameplay.

With over 300 levels spread across all modes, NONOTOWN offers endless hours of puzzle-solving fun. Each mode has its own unique strategies, keeping the game exciting and rewarding for both newcomers and nonogram veterans.

Unlock achievements, challenge your brain, and enjoy a visually rich puzzle experience that keeps you coming back for more. Ready to master the art of nonograms and tackle the blocks? NONOTOWN is waiting for you!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Italian, Russian
